title: FACILITATION - 211info
text: PROVOKING HOPE RECOVERY SUPPORT SERVICES FACILITATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides wraparound support to parents with substance use issues. Helps support family reunification. 213 NE 10th Street McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Parents of minor children who self identify as having substance use disorder Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (971) 228-2020 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 228-2020 Main phone (971) 312-3752 Alternate After-hours Main phone (971) 228-2020 Hotline (971) 312-3752 After Hours Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Yamhill County Services: Wraparound Facilitation/Community Support * Substance Use Disorder Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY MEALS SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADDICTION RECOVERY SUPPORT SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
